name: Original November 2025 Edge Ordering Bug
description: Reproduces the edge ordering bug. Dictionary iteration caused edges to be returned in arbitrary order. Without SortEdgesForMintDependencies, Router→Group (collateral) edges could follow Group→Avatar (mint) edges, causing ERC1155InsufficientBalance. Source (1.1M CRC) trusts MetriTestSupergroup (0x86533d1ada8ffbe7b6f7244f9a1b707f7f3e239b, 250 trusters). Both source and sink trust the group.
